metadata.description: Base name used to derive all resource names. Lowercase letters and numbers only.
Azure region for all Stage 2 resources.
Administrator login for the Azure SQL logical server.
Administrator password for the Azure SQL logical server.
Entra ID principal display name to set as the SQL server Microsoft Entra administrator.
Object ID of the Entra ID principal to set as the SQL server Microsoft Entra administrator.
Email address notified by the action group when an alert fires.
Resource tags applied to every resource in the stage.

variables.sqlConnectionString: [format('Server=tcp:{0}{1},1433;Initial Catalog={2};Persist Security Info=False;User ID={3};Password={4};MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', variables('sqlServerName'), environment().suffixes.sqlServerHostname, variables('sqlDatabaseName'), parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin'), parameters('sqlAdministratorLoginPassword'))]

metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace.
Azure region for the workspace.
Pricing tier for the workspace.
Data retention in days.
Resource tags.

Customer (workspace) ID used by data sources.

Application type.

Pricing tier for the key vault.
Enable Azure RBAC for data-plane authorization instead of access policies.
Number of days to retain soft-deleted vaults and secrets.
Enable purge protection to prevent permanent deletion during the retention period.
Allow public network access to the vault. Defaults to Disabled for a secure baseline.

Name of the key vault.
URI of the key vault for data-plane access.

Linux runtime stack, for example DOTNETCORE|8.0 or NODE|20-lts.

alertDescription.value: Server-side 5xx responses exceeded the threshold on the web app.

metadata.description: Name of the metric alert rule.
Description of what the alert monitors.
Resource ID of the target resource being monitored.
Metric namespace of the target resource, for example Microsoft.Web/sites.
Name of the metric to evaluate.
Comparison operator for the threshold.
Aggregation applied to the metric before comparison.
Threshold value that triggers the alert.
Alert severity, 0 (critical) to 4 (verbose).
How often the rule evaluates, ISO 8601 duration.
Time window over which the metric is aggregated, ISO 8601 duration.
Resource ID of the action group to notify. Empty disables notification.
Resource tags.
Resource ID of the metric alert.
Name of the metric alert.

alertDescription.value: Average HTTP response time exceeded the threshold on the web app.
